title: populus alba var. bolleana
intro: Populus alba var. bolleana, also known as White Poplar or Silver Poplar, is a deciduous tree native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its grayish-white bark and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Populus alba var. bolleana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Populus alba var. bolleana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
